name: Old Mutual Limited
sub_sector: Life Insurance / Financial holding (life & savings, asset management, P&C insurance, banking)

annual_reports.notes: Group Annual Results booklet (Dec year-end), published mid-March.

interim_reports.notes: Interim results (6 months to 30 June), published ~mid-September

investor_presentations.notes: Results presentation + Capital Markets Day (Q4 2025) deck

notes: Dec year-end. FY2025 results released 17 Mar 2026 (audited, unmodified). Medium-term targets set at Capital Markets Day Oct 2025: RoNAV 15-17pct, RoGEV 14-16pct, VNB margin 2-3pct, OM Insure net underwriting margin 5-8pct, DPS growth 6-9pct (3-yr rolling). R3bn buyback (R0.7bn done). R2.5bn cost-savings programme. OM Bank targeting profitability FY2028.

old-mutual-annual-results-fy2025-2026031._provenance: Group Annual Results for the year ended 31 December 2025. COVERAGE GAP: original binary PDF blocked by sandbox allowlist (oldmutual.com 403); full extracted text saved as sidecar. Deep-run backfill should re-download the binary via browser.
